evals.name: basic-prioritize
evals.prompt:
Groom the backlog for me. The backlog file is at: /Users/phuhung/.claude/skills/po-backlog-groomer-workspace/iteration-1/test-data/backlog-basic.md

This is a mobile memory app (React Native). The app's current focus is user acquisition — we want to grow signups. Our sprint is 1 week, team is 2 devs. Prioritize everything and give me the WSJF scores.
evals.expected_output: WSJF scores for all 6 stories, P-labels assigned, backlog sorted, grooming summary showing what to pull into sprint next

evals.name: health-check
evals.prompt:
Run a backlog health check on: /Users/phuhung/.claude/skills/po-backlog-groomer-workspace/iteration-1/test-data/backlog-health.md

This is a mobile couples memory app. Sprint 18 is active. Find all issues before I pull anything into the sprint.
evals.expected_output: Health issues detected: duplicate (auth-social-login + auth-social-login-v2), stale story (push-notification-daily from sprint-12), vague title (fix-stuff), missing AC (photo-filter), orphaned epic (epic-timeline-view)

evals.name: mixed-groom
evals.prompt:
Full backlog grooming session. Backlog: /Users/phuhung/.claude/skills/po-backlog-groomer-workspace/iteration-1/test-data/backlog-mixed.md

Context: Memoura is a couples memory app (RN). We have a production crash on iOS 17 (crash-login-ios). Team size: 2 devs, 1-week sprint. Goal this sprint: stability first, then growth. Groom everything and tell me what to pull into sprint.
evals.expected_output: crash-login-ios forced to P0 (production bug override), L-sized stories flagged for split, sprint recommendation with only S/M items, grooming summary with clear pull list
